productDisplayName: Puma Men's Cbn Logo Black T-Shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with ribbed neckline,  metallic graphic print on the chest and metallic brand logo on the back below neckline FittingRegularWash Care Gentle machine wash with similar colours in cool water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Look hot this summer in this sleek black tee from puma.
